creator: micadeyeye@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to pyrus from comment #7)
Pidgin-lurch is mapped to Pidgin-otr, which is in the security category; and so is their corresponding libraries.

It is indeed a new port.  And I was informed that it should not be posted here until it is time for testing. In addition, I should take the discussion to the mailing list and forum (it started from there, the forum, though). I am now equally confused by you saying that  it should be 'in bug reports'. I was under the impression that this is the bug report engine. I most likely submitted it in the wrong section though.
